Video: Israel passes law to execute Palestinians linked to 7 October attacks
findings.summary:
Video: Israel passes law to execute Palestinians linked to 7 October attacks

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli parliament approved a bill on Tuesday to establish public trials and impose the death penalty on Palestinian detainees accused of taking part in the 7 October attacks.

The legislation was passed in the Knesset with 93 votes in favour and no opposition, drawing support from across the political spectrum.


The Israeli parliament approved a bill on Tuesday to estab...

findings.title: Video: Turkey’s Fidan says Israel’s policies becoming ‘global security problem’
findings.summary:
Video: Turkey’s Fidan says Israel’s policies becoming ‘global security problem’

    
    

        
    
                Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said on Tuesday that Israel’s actions are no longer confined to the region but are evolving into a “global security problem”, accusing Israel of escalating regional tensions through violence and expansionism.


Turkish Foreign Minister Hakan Fidan said on Tuesday that Israel’s actions are no longer confined to the region but are evolvin...

findings.title: Israeli drone strike hits town in southern Lebanon
findings.summary:
Israeli drone strike hits town in southern Lebanon

    
    

        
    
                The Israeli military said several rockets were fired by Hezbollah towards Israeli forces operating in southern Lebanon during the past few hours, adding that the projectiles landed near troops without causing injuries.

The army also said it intercepted a “hostile aerial target” aimed at Israeli forces in the area.

Meanwhile, the Israeli Home Front Command reported that warning sirens sounded in Aviv...

findings.title: Two paramedics and soldier among 15 killed in Israeli strikes in Lebanon
findings.summary:
Two paramedics and soldier among 15 killed in Israeli strikes in Lebanon

    
    

        
    
                Fifteen people, including two paramedics and a Lebanese soldier, were killed and 13 others wounded on Tuesday in 59 Israeli attacks across Lebanon, according to Anadolu Agency.

The reported attacks included air strikes and artillery shelling despite a ceasefire declared on 17 April.

Israeli aircraft carried out 23 raids in the Tyre district, targeting areas including Tyre, Al-M...

findings.title: Abu Dhabi sanctions 21 people and groups over Hezbollah links, state media reports
findings.summary:
Abu Dhabi sanctions 21 people and groups over Hezbollah links, state media reports

    
    

        
    
                The United Arab Emirates has designated 16 Lebanese nationals and five Lebanon-based entities as “terrorists” over alleged links to Hezbollah, according to the state-run Emirates News Agency.

The report said UAE authorities ordered regulatory bodies to identify individuals and companies connected to those listed and freeze related assets within 24 hours in line with na...

findings.title: Israel strikes Lebanon as 380 reported killed since April 17 ceasefire
findings.summary:
Israel hammered south Lebanon with strikes on Tuesday ahead of talks between the two countries in Washington, as Beirut reported 380 people killed in Israeli attacks since an April 17 ceasefire took effect.
Hezbollah chief Naim Qassem vowed to turn the battlefield into “hell” for Israeli forces, and insisted his Iran-backed group’s weapons would not be up for discussion at the talks on Thursday and Friday, after the US had called for its disarmament.
Israel has intensified its attacks on sout...

findings.title: Gaza's displaced persons' camps are overrun by rats
findings.summary: A United Nations agency report published on May 7 highlights the proliferation of rodents and insects in the Palestinian enclave, leading to a surge in cases of bites and skin diseases. Yet, Israel continues to block the entry of equipment needed to clear the mounds of rubble and garbage where these pests thrive.

Yet, Israel continues to block the entry of equipment needed to clear the mounds of rubble and garbage where these pests thrive.

findings.title: October 7: New report documents extent of sexual violence committed by Hamas
findings.summary: The most comprehensive report to date on October 7, with 400 witnesses and experts, finds that Hamas has 'deliberately and systematically resorted to sexual and gender-based violence.'
findings.text: October 7: New report documents extent of sexual violence committed by Hamas | The most comprehensive report to date on October 7, with 400 witnesses and experts, finds that Hamas has 'deliberately and systematically resorted to sexual and gender-based violence.'

findings.title: Israel beschließt Sondertribunal für Hamas-Überfall vom 7. Oktober 2023
findings.summary: Das israelische Parlament hat den Weg für ein Militär-Sondertribunal frei gemacht: Dort sollen sich Hunderte mutmaßliche Terroristen verantworten, die am Überfall vom 7. Oktober beteiligt gewesen sein sollen. Auch die Todesstrafe ist vorgesehen.
findings.text: Israel beschließt Sondertribunal für Hamas-Überfall vom 7. Oktober 2023 | Das israelische Parlament hat den Weg für ein Militär-Sondertribunal frei gemacht: Dort sollen sich Hunderte mutmaßliche Terroristen verantworten, die am Überfall vom 7. Oktober beteiligt gewesen sein sollen. Auch die Todesstrafe ist vorgesehen.

findings.title: Streit um Israel: Was den ESC mit einem EU-Dilemma verbindet
findings.summary: Weil sie Israels Vorgehen im Gazastreifen kritisieren und dem Land eine Manipulierung des ESC vorwerfen, bleiben fünf Staaten dem Wettbewerb fern. Der Streit um den Umgang mit Israel steht auch für eine Debatte in der EU. Von K. Schmid.
findings.text: Streit um Israel: Was den ESC mit einem EU-Dilemma verbindet | Weil sie Israels Vorgehen im Gazastreifen kritisieren und dem Land eine Manipulierung des ESC vorwerfen, bleiben fünf Staaten dem Wettbewerb fern. Der Streit um den Umgang mit Israel steht auch für eine Debatte in der EU. Von K. Schmid.

findings.title: El alivio imposible de los pacientes quemados durante los ataques en Gaza: “No entra nada desde enero. Estamos asfixiados”
findings.summary: Una clínica de Médicos Sin Fronteras (MSF) es el único centro en la Franja que imprime máscaras de fisioterapia indispensables para estos heridos, pero carece de insumos y de personal médico, debido a que Israel ha prohibido que siga operando en Palestina
findings.text: El alivio imposible de los pacientes quemados durante los ataques en Gaza: “No entra nada desde enero. findings.title: ‘İsrail tecavüzüne ABD de ortak’... Hapishane kâbusunu Amerikan basını da yazdı
findings.summary: Amerikan NYT gazetesi yazarı Kristof, İsrail hapishanelerinde tutulan Filistinlilerin maruz kaldığı tecavüz, cinsel şiddet ve işkenceyi mağdurların tanıklıklarıyla yazdı. Filistinli tutuklular, copla cinsel saldırıdan sistematik aşağılanmaya kadar yaşadıkları ağır istismarları anlattı. Kristof, “İsrail güvenlik sistemini finanse eden ABD de bu suça ortak” diyerek Washington’a “zulmü durdurun” çağrısı yaptı.
findings.text: ‘İsrail tecavüzüne ABD de ortak’... Hapishane kâbusunu Amerikan basını da yazdı | Amerikan NYT gazetesi yazarı Kristof, İsrail hapishanelerinde tutulan Filistinlilerin maruz kaldığı tecavüz, cinsel şiddet ve işkenceyi mağdurların tanıklıklarıyla yazdı. Filistinli tutuklular, copla cinsel saldırıdan sistematik aşağılanmaya kadar yaşadıkları ağır istismarları anlattı. Kristof, “İsrail güvenlik sistemini finanse eden ABD de bu suça ortak” diyerek Washington’a “zulmü durdurun” çağrısı yaptı.

findings.title: Sauver le cessez-le-feu entre Israël et le Liban en composant avec ses limites
findings.summary: La trêve entre Israël et le Hezbollah, prolongée le 23 avril, ne tient qu’à un fil. Le mécanisme de surveillance mis en place pour le précédent cessez-le-feu pourrait aider à préserver l’actuel.

findings.title: To Salvage the Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire, Work within Its Limits
findings.summary: The truce between Israel and Hizbollah, extended on 23 April, is hanging by a thread. The monitoring mechanism established for the previous ceasefire could help preserve the current one.
findings.text: To Salvage the Israel-Lebanon Ceasefire, Work within Its Limits | The truce between Israel and Hizbollah, extended on 23 April, is hanging by a thread. The monitoring mechanism established for the previous ceasefire could help preserve the current one.

findings.title: Guerre au Moyen-Orient: au nord d'Israël, la menace permanente des drones du Hezbollah
findings.summary: L'armée israélienne a déclaré mardi 12 mai 2026 que ses troupes avaient mené une opération de plusieurs jours dans la région du fleuve Litani, dans le sud du Liban, où des échanges de tirs avec le Hezbollah se poursuivent malgré un cessez-le-feu. 13 morts ont été annoncés mardi soir dans des frappes israeliennes selon les autorités libanaises. Côté israélien de la frontière, beaucoup d’habitants ont quitté la zone frontalière avec le Liban. Le cessez le feu a été décrété il y a presque un moi...
